products.name: Canonical lays out a plan for AI in Ubuntu Linux
products.summary: One of the most popular Linux distributions is about to get an influx of AI features. As reported by Phoronix, Jon Seager, VP of engineering at Ubuntu developer Canonical, shared a blog post on Monday detailing plans to add AI features to the Linux distro over

products.name: Trump demands ABC fire Jimmy Kimmel
products.summary: President Donald Trump is calling for Disney to fire Jimmy Kimmel. On Thursday, Kimmel joked that Melania Trump had looked like an "expectant widow" in a skit about the upcoming White House Correspondents' Dinner. The skit aired days before an armed gunman mad

products.name: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
products.summary: Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. Its organizers claim many of the signers work in Google's DeepMind AI lab

products.name: Conspiracy theories are swirling about the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting

products.name: Why the Steam Controller is (and isn’t) a big deal
products.summary: Most PC gamers already have a controller they love using with Steam - a Sony DualSense, a 8BitDo Ultimate, a Nintendo Switch Pro, or something else. Part of that love comes from Steam treating them like "native" controllers. They can do the things that made th

products.name: Valve’s new Steam Controller isn’t perfect, but I’m buying one anyway
products.summary: After my brief hands-on last year with Valve's new Steam Controller, I said it might be my dream controller. I've been looking for a controller with the customization and sheer function available on Valve's Steam Deck while I'm playing games on the TV. You, me

products.name: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine
products.summary: Last November, Valve introduced the world to its new vision of living room gaming: the Steam Machine and Steam Controller. Then, RAMageddon. Memory shortages forced Valve to delay all its hardware and reset expectations. Now, Valve is releasing the Steam Contr

products.name: We reviewed Valve’s new Steam Controller, ask us anything
products.summary: Hey hey, it's Jay Peters, senior reporter at The Verge. Today, Valve finally announced that the second version of the Steam Controller - and the first piece of Valve's slate of new gaming hardware set to launch this year - is finally going on sale for $99 on M

products.name: Samsung’s first smart glasses have leaked
products.summary: The upcoming Samsung Galaxy Glasses look nearly identical to Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses in leaked images from Android Headlines. The glasses, which could be announced at Google I/O next month, are code-named "Jinju" and will reportedly cost between $379 and

products.name: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
products.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped. On Monday morning, Microsoft announced

products.name: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner
products.summary: Potential buyers of Letterboxd include Versant, the parent company of CNBC and MS NOW, and Hollywood media company The Ankler, according to Semafor.

products.name: Consumers lost $2.1B to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
products.summary: The agency reports that losses from social media scams have increased eightfold and that social media scams resulted in higher losses than any other method scammers used to contact consumers.
